attractionsPage.title: Explore & Local Guide
attractionsPage.subtitle: Unmissable destinations around The Royal Citadel
attractionsPage.noMapData: No map data available for this location.
attractionsPage.hoian_desc: Explore the UNESCO-listed ancient town with hundreds of heritage houses, the iconic Japanese Bridge, and enchanting lanterns glowing at night. A fusion of Vietnamese, Chinese, and Japanese cultures.
attractionsPage.hoian_full:
Hoi An Ancient Town – A UNESCO World Heritage Site and one of Southeast Asia's most captivating destinations.

🏛️ TOP HIGHLIGHTS:
• Japanese Covered Bridge – A historic icon over 400 years old
• Fujian Assembly Hall – Magnificent Chinese architecture with serene courtyards
• Lantern Streets – Dazzling colors illuminating every full-moon night
• Tra Que Vegetable Village – Experience organic farming and traditional cooking

🍜 SIGNATURE CUISINE:
• Cao Lau – A unique noodle dish exclusive to Hoi An
• Mi Quang – Rich Central Vietnamese flavors
• Banh Mi Phuong – World-famous, with queues every day
• Hoi An Chicken Rice – Simple yet unforgettable

💡 TIPS: Visit in the late afternoon to enjoy the magical lantern atmosphere. Purchase sightseeing tickets at the Cultural Center.
attractionsPage.bana_desc: A mountaintop resort featuring the world-famous Golden Bridge, a classic French village, Fantasy Park amusement center, and record-breaking cable cars.
attractionsPage.bana_full:
Ba Na Hills – A premier mountaintop resort, home to the iconic Golden Bridge.

🌉 HIGHLIGHTS:
• Golden Bridge – Held aloft by giant stone hands, ranked among the Top 100 most beautiful landmarks worldwide
• French Village – Classic European architecture, like stepping into a miniature Paris
• Fantasy Park – Vietnam's largest indoor amusement park
• Le Jardin D'Amour – 9 romantic themed gardens

🚡 CABLE CAR:
• A cable car system holding 2 Guinness World Records (longest & greatest elevation difference)
• Travel time: ~20 minutes one way

⏰ OPENING HOURS: 07:00 – 22:00
💰 TICKETS: From 900,000₫/adult (includes cable car + admission)
attractionsPage.mykhe_desc: Named by Forbes as one of the 6 most luxurious beaches on the planet. Pristine white sand, crystal-clear waters, ideal for surfing and sunbathing.
attractionsPage.mykhe_full:
My Khe Beach – Voted by Forbes Magazine as one of the 6 most luxurious beaches on the planet.

🏖️ FEATURES:
• Over 900m of naturally pristine white sand coastline
• Crystal-clear waters with gentle waves – perfect for swimming and surfing
• Just a 5-minute walk from The Royal Citadel

🏄 ACTIVITIES:
• Surfing – Best wave season: September–December
• Stand Up Paddle (SUP)
• Parasailing
• Sunbathing & sunset watching

🌅 BEST TIMES: Sunrise (05:30) and sunset (17:00–18:00)
attractionsPage.marble_desc: Five sacred limestone peaks featuring a network of caves, ancient pagodas, and breathtaking panoramic views of the city and coastline.
attractionsPage.marble_full:
Marble Mountains – A cluster of five limestone peaks representing the five elements: Metal, Wood, Water, Fire, and Earth.

⛰️ ATTRACTIONS:
• Huyen Khong Cave – The largest cave with stunning natural light
• Non Nuoc Pagoda – A centuries-old temple
• Xa Loi Tower – 360° panoramic views of the sea and city
• Non Nuoc Stone Craft Village – Exquisite stone sculpture artistry

🎒 TIPS:
• Wear comfortable shoes (many stairs)
• Allow 2–3 hours for exploration
• Visit early morning to avoid the heat

⏰ OPENING HOURS: 07:00 – 17:30
💰 TICKETS: 40,000₫/person
attractionsPage.sontra_desc: A nature reserve home to Linh Ung Pagoda, Vietnam's tallest Guanyin Buddha statue, primeval forests, and unspoiled beaches.
attractionsPage.sontra_full:
Son Tra Peninsula – The "green lung" of Da Nang, a nature reserve rich in biodiversity.

🌿 HIGHLIGHTS:
• Linh Ung Pagoda – Vietnam's tallest Lady Buddha statue at 67m
• Red-shanked Douc Langur – A rare primate species, the "queen" of primates
• Bai But – A stunningly pristine beach
• Ban Co Peak – Panoramic views of all Da Nang from above

🏍️ GETTING THERE:
• Motorbike or car (beautiful winding mountain roads)
• Vehicle rental available at The Royal Citadel

⏰ BEST TIMES: Early morning (5:00–7:00) or late afternoon (15:00–17:00)
attractionsPage.hanmarket_desc: A bustling traditional market offering fresh seafood, Central Vietnamese specialties, souvenirs, and an authentic street food experience.
attractionsPage.hanmarket_full:
Han Market – Da Nang's oldest and most vibrant market, a street food paradise.

🍜 MUST-TRY DISHES:
• Bun Cha Ca Da Nang – A signature fish cake noodle soup unique to this city
• Banh Trang Cuon Thit Heo – Central Vietnam's number one specialty
• Fresh Seafood – Shrimp, crab, clams grilled on the spot
• Che Bap Hoi An – A refreshingly sweet corn dessert

🛍️ SHOPPING:
• Floor 1: Food, dried seafood, spices
• Floor 2: Fabrics, clothing, souvenirs
• Specialties: Nam O fish sauce, dried squid, Ba Na tea

⏰ OPENING HOURS: 06:00 – 19:00 (Busiest: 7:00–10:00 & 15:00–18:00)
💡 TIPS: Bargain for souvenirs (~70% of listed price)

servicesPage.title: Services & Amenities
servicesPage.subtitle: Experience 5-star premium services at The Royal Citadel
servicesPage.ctaDesc: Our Concierge team is ready to assist you 24/7
servicesPage.svc1Desc: An upscale restaurant serving premium Asian–European cuisine, fresh seafood, and a wine list curated by our Sommelier.
servicesPage.svc1Full:
The Jade Garden Restaurant is The Royal Citadel's culinary pride, where Asian–European gastronomy meets an exquisite atmosphere.

🍽️ SIGNATURE MENU:
• Lobster Thermidor – Legendary Gruyère-baked lobster
• Wagyu A5 Steak – Japanese A5 Wagyu, perfectly medium-rare
• Phở Royal – Traditional beef phở with 48-hour broth
• Seafood Tower – 3-tier tower: oysters, prawns, king crab

🍷 WINE:
A cellar of 300+ wines from France, Italy, Chile curated by our Sommelier.

⏰ SERVING HOURS:
• Breakfast buffet: 06:00 – 10:00
• Lunch: 11:30 – 14:00
• Fine dining dinner: 18:00 – 23:00
• Bar & Lounge: 15:00 – 01:00
servicesPage.svc2Desc: A 2,000m² spa center with over 20 wellness and beauty treatments using organic natural ingredients.
servicesPage.svc2Full:
Royal Wellness Spa delivers the ultimate relaxation with over 20 bespoke treatments.

💆 SIGNATURE TREATMENTS:
• Royal Gold Facial – 24K gold mask with deep-sea collagen (90 min)
• Herbal Body Wrap – Traditional Vietnamese herbal wrap (120 min)
• Hot Stone Therapy – Volcanic hot stone stress relief (60 min)
• Couple Retreat – Private VIP couple's spa package

⏰ HOURS: 08:00 – 22:00 (Book 24h in advance)
servicesPage.svc3Desc: Modern gym with Technogym equipment, an infinity pool overlooking the sea, and daily morning yoga with a personal trainer.
servicesPage.svc3Full:
Fitness & Aqua Center is the sports paradise within The Royal Citadel.

🏋️ GYM:
• Full Technogym (Italy) premium equipment
• Professional 1-on-1 Personal Trainer

🏊 POOL:
• 50m Infinity Pool overlooking My Khe Beach
• Pool Bar serving cocktails & snacks

⏰ HOURS: 05:30 – 21:00
servicesPage.svc4Desc: A beauty salon with international experts, premium hair styling, skincare, and nail art services.
servicesPage.svc4Full:
Citadel Beauty Lounge – Where beauty is elevated to international standards.

💇 HAIR:
• Styling by international stylists
• Premium coloring & highlights

💅 NAIL ART:
• Gel, dipping powder artistry

⏰ HOURS: 09:00 – 20:00
servicesPage.svc5Desc: Luxury airport transfers by limousine, private yacht tours, and sports car rentals.
servicesPage.svc5Full:
Limousine & Transfers – Travel in style worthy of The Royal Citadel.

🚗 AIRPORT TRANSFERS:
• Mercedes S-Class / BMW 7 Series
• Rolls-Royce Ghost (VIP service)

🚢 YACHT:
• Private Son Tra Peninsula yacht tour

📞 BOOKING: 24/7 at Concierge
servicesPage.svc6Desc: A conference center with 5 meeting rooms for 10-500 guests, advanced AV technology, and luxury wedding services.
servicesPage.svc6Full:
Business & Events Center – The perfect space for every occasion.

🏢 MEETING ROOMS:
• Grand Ballroom (500 guests)
• Boardroom VIP (20 guests)

🎊 EVENTS:
• Luxury weddings
• Team Building & Corporate Events

📞 CONTACT: events@royalcitadel.vn
